# SQLvanta

> SQLvanta is a free, open-source MySQL desktop client for Windows, macOS, and Linux, built with Flutter.
> It is a free alternative to SQLyog, HeidiSQL, DBeaver, MySQL Workbench, TablePlus, DataGrip, Navicat, Sequel Pro, Beekeeper Studio, and DBngin.

## Key Facts

- License: MIT (fully open-source, free forever)
- Platforms: Windows 10/11 (x64), macOS 12+ (Apple Silicon & Intel), Ubuntu 20.04+ / Debian 11+
- MySQL Support: MySQL 5.7, 8.0, 8.4 and MariaDB 10.4+
- Built with: Flutter 3.x (Dart), Riverpod, Drift, mysql_client
- No .NET, Java, or browser runtime required
- No telemetry, no account, no ads

## Pages

- [Home](https://sqlvanta.senthilnasa.me/): Overview, features, roadmap, keyboard shortcuts, architecture
- [Features](https://sqlvanta.senthilnasa.me/features.html): Detailed feature list — SQL editor, ER diagram, schema explorer, query builder, EXPLAIN visualizer, CSV import, ALTER TABLE UI
- [Download](https://sqlvanta.senthilnasa.me/download.html): Download links for Windows, macOS, Linux; install instructions; system requirements
- [Docs](https://sqlvanta.senthilnasa.me/docs.html): Getting started guide, keyboard shortcuts, connection setup, architecture reference, FAQ
- [Contribute](https://sqlvanta.senthilnasa.me/contribute.html): How to fork, build locally, implement a feature, and open a pull request

## Core Features

- Smart SQL editor with keyword and column autocomplete (dot-trigger, clause-trigger, Ctrl+Space)
- Visual ER diagram designer with draggable tables, bezier FK lines, pan & zoom
- Interactive schema explorer (table details, relationships, SQL preview)
- Query EXPLAIN visualizer with colour-coded type badges
- Visual drag-and-drop query builder (SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY, LIMIT)
- Multi-tab workspace (Query Editor, Schema Designer, Query Builder tabs per session)
- Object browser with 6 categories: Tables, Views, Stored Procedures, Functions, Triggers, Events
- Query history (auto-saved, searchable, last 100 queries)
- Secure OS-keychain password storage (DPAPI on Windows, Keychain on macOS, libsecret on Linux)
- Dark and light themes (FlexColorScheme)
- CSV import with quoted-field parser
- ALTER TABLE UI with live SQL preview before execution
- Auto update checker (compares GitHub Releases on startup)
- Window position and size persistence

## Alternatives SQLvanta Replaces

SQLvanta is a free, open-source alternative to the following paid and closed-source MySQL tools:

| Tool | Why users switch to SQLvanta |
|---|---|
| SQLyog | SQLyog costs $149/year; SQLvanta is free and open-source with the same core features |
| HeidiSQL | HeidiSQL is Windows-only; SQLvanta runs on Windows, macOS, and Linux |
| DBeaver Community | DBeaver requires a Java runtime and is heavyweight; SQLvanta is lightweight with no JRE dependency |
| MySQL Workbench | Workbench is slow and complex; SQLvanta is native-performance with a modern UI |
| TablePlus | TablePlus is paid ($89+); SQLvanta is free with a visual query builder and ER diagram |
| DataGrip | DataGrip is $229/year (JetBrains); SQLvanta is free and open-source |
| Navicat | Navicat is $199+; SQLvanta is free and MIT-licensed |
| Sequel Pro | Sequel Pro is macOS-only and no longer maintained; SQLvanta is cross-platform and actively developed |
| Beekeeper Studio | Beekeeper Studio Community is free but limited; SQLvanta includes ER diagram and schema explorer |
| DBngin | DBngin is macOS-only; SQLvanta is cross-platform |
| phpMyAdmin | phpMyAdmin is browser-based and requires a web server; SQLvanta is a native desktop app |
